title: Records Create Accountability
prompt: Ask whether the decision can be reconstructed from data, model, threshold, reviewer, appeal, and remediation records.

title: Responsibility Survives Delegation
prompt: Map who owns approval, monitoring, review, escalation, remediation, and retirement after automation is introduced.

title: Repair Completes the Audit
prompt: Connect incidents and appeals to correction, remedy, root-cause review, and recurrence prevention.
